title: Fermented Saudi Fruit Stir-Fry
description: A silky, light dish featuring fermented fruit in a caramel sauce, perfect for a diabetic-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp coconut sugar (or to taste for sweetness)
A handful of fresh mint leaves

instructions: Slice the mango and pineapple into thin strips.
In a small bowl, mix together coconut sugar, lime juice, ground cinnamon, and chopped mint leaves until well combined. Add more sugar or lemon for desired sweetness.

Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Once hot, add a spoonful of the sweet and spicy sauce to each mango and pineapple strip. Let cook until heated through but not too browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove from heat and serve warm as a snack or dessert.
